items.title: Rutte's Washington visit centers on transatlantic security
items.summary: NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte met U.S. officials in Washington and stressed a stronger and fairer alliance.

items.title: Rutte says every ally is now at the 2% floor
items.summary: Rutte said NATO's annual report shows every ally now meets the 2% defence-spending target.

items.title: Ankara summit remains the next major alliance milestone
items.summary: NATO has already announced that the 2026 leaders' summit will be held in Ankara.
